description: Attempted baseline run with an unsupported run_experiment command wrapper; rerunning the harness directly.

asi.hypothesis: Use the repo-root autoresearch harness as the benchmark entrypoint.
asi.rollback_reason: run_experiment rejected the wrapped command and required ./autoresearch.sh directly.
asi.next_action_hint: Rerun with command './autoresearch.sh' so the benchmark and checks execute normally.

description: Baseline render benchmark with the new autoresearch harness on the default linux case.

asi.hypothesis: Capture a stable end-to-end baseline before changing the render path.
asi.observed_effect: constructAndRender median is ~120.3ms while isolated renderStaticWindow is ~127.0ms, so the current benchmark still spends most time in work that survives into the render-only pass or is affected by measurement noise.
likely_hotspots: per-row SSR cost for the first window
asi.next_action_hint: Probe whether Root/useTree/core can avoid constructing full visible item arrays or full item instances when virtualization only needs a bounded window.

description: Deferred full item-instance materialization until lookup time and rendered virtualized rows from cached visible item IDs instead of tree.getItems(). Big render win, but internal core tests failed on eager instanceBuilder expectations during rebuilds.

asi.hypothesis: Virtualization should not need a full item instance array for the whole visible tree. Cache visible IDs/meta in core, lazily create item instances on demand, and render rows from the cached ID list.
asi.observed_effect: Very large primary-metric improvement (~52% better than baseline).
asi.rollback_reason: packages/trees/test/core/core.test.ts asserts that rebuildTree and expanded-state config changes trigger instanceBuilder calls. The lazy refactor removed those eager calls.
failing_checks: core/feature-composition > Synchronous Data Loader > rebuilds item instance > rebuilds when explicitly invoked
core/feature-composition > Synchronous Data Loader > rebuilds item instance > rebuilds when config changes with new expanded items
core/feature-composition > Proxified Synchronous Data Loader > rebuilds item instance > rebuilds when explicitly invoked
core/feature-composition > Proxified Synchronous Data Loader > rebuilds item instance > rebuilds when config changes with new expanded items
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect whether eager instanceBuilder calls are a real internal contract. If yes, preserve those rebuild-time side effects while still letting Root/virtualized render paths consume cached visible IDs without calling tree.getItems(). If not, update the internal tests and re-validate the broader suite carefully.
